final_text:
{
  "deployment_strategy": "Blue-green deployment",
  "infrastructure_components": [
    "Cloud server instances",
    "Load balancer",
    "Database server",
    "CI/CD pipeline",
    "Monitoring tools"
  ],
  "environment_requirements": [
    "Cloud provider account",
    "Domain name",
    "SSL certificate",
    "Database instance"
  ],
  "ci_cd_requirements": [
    "Version control system (e.g., GitHub)",
    "CI/CD tool (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions)",
    "Automated testing suite",
    "Deployment scripts"
  ],
  "release_steps": [
    "Build the application using the CI/CD pipeline.",
    "Deploy the new version to the green environment.",
    "Run automated tests to verify the new version.",
    "If tests pass, switch traffic to the green environment.",
    "Monitor the new version for any issues."
  ],
  "rollback_steps": [
    "Identify the issue in the current version.",
    "Switch traffic back to the blue environment.",
    "Fix the issue in the codebase.",
    "Redeploy the fixed version to the green environment.",
    "Run tests and switch traffic back to the green environment if successful."
  ],
  "monitoring_requirements": [
    "Application performance monitoring",
    "Error tracking",
    "Log aggregation",
    "Alerting for critical issues"
  ],
  "deployment_notes": [
    "Ensure all services are running and healthy before switching traffic.",
    "Monitor the application closely after deployment for any anomalies.",
    "Keep detailed release notes for each deployment."
  ]
}
